tooltips.curve:
Serves in the Malazan army.

Travels with:
The Bridgeburners
tooltips.endPoint: Is present at the siege of pale.

tooltips.curve:
Is carried by the Moranth towards Darujhistan for his next mission.

Travels with:
The Bridgeburners, Paran, Apsalar

Crosses the lake by boat.

Travels with:
The Bridgeburners, Paran, Apsalar
tooltips.endPoint: Completes his mission in Darujhistan.

tooltips.curve:
Escorts Apsalar back to Itko Kan.

Travels with:
Kalam, Crokus, Apsalar
tooltips.endPoint: Instead of going to Quon Tali directly, he and Kalam decide to use the Azath house Tremorlor to get into Malaz unseen which would help them with their secret goal of killing empress Laseen.

tooltips.curve:
Travels to Seven Cities to find Tremorlor.

Travels with:
Kalam, Crokus, Apsalar
tooltips.endPoint: Kalam splits from the group leaving Fiddler alone with Crokus and Apsalar.

tooltips.curve:
Continues to search for Tremorlor under the guise of an outcast Gral who protects Crokus and Apsalar who pretend to be a newly wed couple.

Travels with:
Crokus, Apsalar
tooltips.endPoint: Apsalar thinks they are being pursued. Fiddler thinks it's the Gral who are searching for him due to his disguise.

tooltips.curve:
Head's into the whirlwind to escape the Gral.

Travels with:
Crokus, Apsalar
tooltips.endPoint: Meets Mappo and Icarium who were send to find him, Crokus and Apsalar by Iskaral Pust.

tooltips.curve:
Is taken by to Tesem by Mappo and Icarium.

Travels with:
Crokus, Apsalar, Icarium, Mappo
tooltips.endPoint: Stays in Tesem for a while.

tooltips.curve:
Follows Apsalar who is following her father into the Whirlwind.

Travels with:
Crokus, Icarium, Mappo
tooltips.endPoint: Enters the Azath Warren of Tremorlor.

tooltips.curve:
Travels through the Azath's paths.

Travels with:
Crokus, Apsalar
tooltips.endPoint: Re-enlists to join the recruits heading to Aren after Crokus and Apsalar have been teleported to Itko Kan by Shadowthrone.

tooltips.curve:
Sails with Tavore's new army to Seven Cities to stop the rebellion.

Travels with:
Tavore and her army

Marches into the Raraku to defeat Sha'ik.

Travels with:
The Bonehunters
tooltips.endPoint: Defeats Sha'ik.

tooltips.curve:
Chases Leoman and his rebels with the Bonehunters.

Travels with:
The Bonehunters
tooltips.endPoint: Fights in Y'Gathan and is left behind beneath the city.

tooltips.curve:
Catches up to the Bonehunter main forces.

Travels with:
His squad, Apsalar, Quick Ben, Kalam, Faradan Sort, Stormy, Gessler
tooltips.endPoint: Rejoins the Bonehunters.

tooltips.curve:
Sails with the Bonehunters to Malaz.

Travels with:
The Bonehunters
tooltips.endPoint: Meets the Verender who join the Bonehunters.

tooltips.curve:
Is teleported through the Warren of Togg and Fanderay by the Verender.

Travels with:
The Bonehunters, The Verender
tooltips.endPoint: Leaves the Warren.

tooltips.curve:
Follows the Bonehunters to Malaz.

Travels with:
The Bonehunters, The Verender
tooltips.endPoint: Defends the Bonehunter fleet against the angry mob.

tooltips.curve:
Leaves with the now outcast Bonehunters to Letheras to take revenge on the Edur.

Travels with:
The Bonehunters, The Verender
tooltips.endPoint: Takes over the Fort which is then established as the Bonehunters base.

tooltips.curve:
Is send to scout and figure out the current situation in Lether.

Travels with:
His squad
tooltips.endPoint: Joins up with Stormy and Gesler's squad.

tooltips.curve:
Adances further into Lether.

Travels with:
His squad, Stormy and Gesler's squad
tooltips.endPoint: Reunites with the other marine squads.

tooltips.curve:
Advances into Letheras.

Travels with: 
The marines
tooltips.endPoint: Takes over Letheras with the Bonehunter main forces who arrived through the river.

tooltips.curve:
Marches towards Kolanse.

Travels with:
The Bonehunters, Brys and his host
tooltips.endPoint: Stays with the Bonehunters who chose to split from the others and travel straight through the Glass Desert to suprise the Assail.

tooltips.curve:
Tries to traverse the Glass Desert to reach Kolanse.

Travels with:
The Bonehunters
tooltips.endPoint: Takes the children of the Snake into his care.

tooltips.curve:
Follows Tavore northwards in search of water.

Travels with:
The Bonehunters, The children of the Snake
tooltips.endPoint: Reaches the valley where Tavore summons forth water.

tooltips.curve:
Marches towards Kolanse.

Travels with:
The Bonehunters, The children of the Snake
tooltips.endPoint: Is approached by Tavore to join her on a mission.

tooltips.curve:
Rides with Tavore.

Travels with:
Tavore, Banashar
tooltips.endPoint: Tavore uses her Otataral sword to call on Korabas.

tooltips.curve:
Returns to the Bonehunters.

Travels with:
Tavore, Banashar
tooltips.endPoint: Joins the marines when they split from the Bonehunters to seal the Crippled God.

tooltips.curve:
Marches back to the shrine to protect it.

Travels with:
The Bonehunter marines
tooltips.endPoint: Protects the Crippled God's body until he his freed.
Attends Gesler and Stormie's funeral.
Returns to a normal live in Malaz.
